summary: Frontend-only smoke test of the static portfolio site at https://ai-strategy-hub-41.preview.emergentagent.com/. Verified page load, hero content, all nav links & data-testids, section rendering, CTA hrefs, timeline order (FBK -> INSA -> UniTN -> Doctaa), education/awards cards, contact section CTAs & socials, nav active class on scroll, reveal-on-scroll animations, and mobile hamburger toggle behavior. Site is a pure static HTML/CSS/JS page (React root renders null as expected). No blockers found.
passed: Page loads with no console errors; hero-name = 'Ritik Kumar Rai' (with NBSPs)
Hero tagline mentions 'Fondazione Bruno Kessler' and 'Doctaa'; location mentions Trento
Sticky nav renders with brand 'Ritik Rai' and 5 links (About, Experience, Education, Achievements, Contact); nav-toggle present

Hero CTAs: Contact Me href=mailto:rairitikkumar4@gmail.com; Schedule a Call href=#; Download Resume href=# with download attribute; LinkedIn href=https://www.linkedin.com/in/ritik-rai-cs/ target=_blank
All 5 sections visible (about, experience, education, achievements, contact)
About lede mentions Trento; 4 skill groups render inside skills-block
Timeline renders in reverse-chronological order: exp-fbk, exp-insa, exp-unitn, exp-doctaa
Education cards edu-unitn and edu-maastricht render
All 5 award cards render (hpair, eciu, gyaan, cbse, scholarship)

Contact CTAs: email=mailto:rairitikkumar4@gmail.com; schedule=#; resume=# with download; Socials: linkedin=https://www.linkedin.com/in/ritik-rai-cs/, github=https://github.com/rai-ritik, email=mailto:rairitikkumar4@gmail.com
Clicking nav-experience updates URL hash to #experience (smooth scroll works)
After scrolling to a section, corresponding nav link gets 'active' class (verified for nav-experience: 'nav__link active')
Reveal-on-scroll: 17 elements gained 'in-view' class after scroll
Mobile (375px): nav-toggle visible; clicking it adds 'open' class to .nav header; nav links become visible; clicking a link removes 'open' class
No page errors or console errors captured
notes: Placeholder hrefs (#) for Schedule a Call and Download Resume are intentional per spec and not flagged. Backend not in scope for this app (React root intentionally null; static site served from /app/frontend/public/).
